abilities.name: The Path Least Travelled
abilities.text: If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies and determined who has the first turn, you can select one ^^Rangers^^ or ^^Shroud Runners^^ unit from your army and redeploy that unit. When doing so, that unit can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Path of the Outcast
abilities.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Asurmen)
abilities.text: Asurmen has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Hand of Asuryan
abilities.text: Once per battle, when this model is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, its Bloody Twins weapon has a Damage characteristic of 3 and the [Anti-Infantry 5+] and [Devastating Wounds] abilities.

abilities.name: Tactical Acumen
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase, after that unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Dire Avengers

abilities.name: Superlative Strategist
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit, and you can re-roll any rolls made for that unit while it is performing an Agile Manoeuvre.

abilities.name: Path of Command
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Aspect Training
abilities.text:
While this model is leading a Howling Banshees unit, it has the Fights First ability.
While this model is leading a Striking Scorpions unit, it has the Infiltrators, Scouts 7" and Stealth abilities.

abilities.name: Path of Command
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Ride the WInd
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit

abilities.name: Path of Command
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.text: An Autarch Wayleaper has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Indomitable Strength of Will
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable that unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+ you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Swooping Hawks
■ Warp Spiders

abilities.name: Molten Form
abilities.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, halve the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: The Bloody Handed (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly ^^Aeldari^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.text: The Avatar of Khaine has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.text:

abilities.name: Cry of the Wind
abilities.text: Each time this model is set-up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, each time this model makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Cloudstrider
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, at the end of your opponent's turn, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In addition, while this model is leading a unit, when that unit is set-up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, in your Movement phase, it can use this ability. if it does, that unit can be set-up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Wraithblades
■ Wraithguard
■ Wraithlord

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Bonesinger)
abilities.text: A Bonesinger has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Way of the Shaper (Psychic)
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, ^^Wraith Construct^^ models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Bonesinger
abilities.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^Wraith Construct^^ or ^^Asuryani Vehicle^^ units, unless it is leading a unit, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Psytronome Shaper
abilities.text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^Wraith Construct^^ or ^^Asuryani Vehicle^^ model within 3" of this model. That ^^ Wraith Construct^^ or ^^Asuryani Vehicle^^ model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-8 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text:
While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from
its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model
makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: D-Rift
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s D-impaler, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a D-rift. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a D-rift this phase suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Reckless Abandon
abilities.text: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Reaver Band
abilities.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: Corsairs
abilities.text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^Corsair Voidreavers^^ unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Skyleap
abilities.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Raid and Run
abilities.text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3". Otherwise, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can make a Fall Back move of up to D3+3".

abilities.name: Reavers of the Void
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Piratical Raiders
abilities.text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Craftworld Warleader)
abilities.text: A Craftworld Warleader has a 4+ Invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Guided by Fate
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack with its D-Cannon, re-roll a Damage roll of 1. If that attack targets a Titanic unit, you can re-roll the Damage roll instead.

abilities.name: Support Artillery
abilities.text:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model can join one Guardian Defenders unit from your army (a unit cannot have more than one Support Weapon model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that Guardians unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit's Starting Strength is increased accordingly.


This model, and any unit it is joined to, cannot embark within a Transport.

abilities.name: Support Weapon
abilities.text: Each time an attack targets this model's unit, it that unit contains one or more other models, until that attack is resolved, this model has a Toughness characteristic of 3.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Inescapable Accuracy
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Aspect Shrine Token
abilities.text:
Once per battle for each Aspect Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit (excluding ^^**Character**^^ models) to an unmodified 6.

For every 5 models in this unit, it can have 1 Aspect Shrine token.

abilities.name: Death is Not Enough
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If one or more of those attacks destroyed a model in that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Cruel Amusement
abilities.text:
In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, select one of the abilities below. Until the end of the phase, this model’s Shrieker Cannon has that ability:
■ [IGNORES COVER]
■ [PRECISION]
■ [SUSTAINED HITS 3]

abilities.name: Travelling Players
abilities.text: Unless otherwise stated, you cannot include more than one of this model in your army.

abilities.name: Bladestorm

Until the end of the turn, that unit is riven. Each time an ^^**Aeldari**^^ model from your army makes an attack that targets a riven unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Harvester of Souls
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase, after selecting targets for that unit's attacks, if every attack targets the same unit, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for every other enemy unit within 3" of the target unit. On a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by explosive debris; after resolving all of that unit's attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by explosive debris suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Face of Death
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Monofilament Web
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its doomweaver scored a hit against an enemy unit, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit's Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Interceptor
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can ^^Fly^^, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-16 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-16 wounds remaining, subtract 10 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding ^^Titanic^^ models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.text: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

abilities.name: Monofilament Snare
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Shadow Weaver. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit it snared. While a unit is snared, each time that unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 1, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Support Artillery
abilities.text:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model can join one Guardian Defenders unit from your army (a unit cannot have more than one Support Weapon model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that Guardians unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit's Starting Strength is increased accordingly.


This model, and any unit it is joined to, cannot embark within a Transport.

abilities.text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Wraith Construct unit within 6" of this model. If one or more models in that unit are destroyed, you can return one destroyed model to that unit. Otherwise, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Stormblades

If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abilities.name: Runes of Battle (Psychic)
abilities.text: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [Ignores Cover] ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Warlock)
abilities.text: A Warlock Skyrunner has a 4+ Invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Devastating Assault
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Flickerjump
abilities.text: In your Movement phase, each time this unit is selected to make a Normal move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge and models in it have a Move characteristic of 24". Each time this unit uses this ability, at the end of the phase, roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 1, this unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Aspect Shrine Token
abilities.text:
Once per battle for each Aspect Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit (excluding ^^**Character**^^ models) to an unmodified 6.

For every 5 models in this unit, it can have 1 Aspect Shrine token.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Cloudbreakers
abilities.text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Wave Serpent Shield
abilities.text: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Arcane Cover
abilities.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Webway Strike
abilities.text: Each time a friendly AELDARI unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, you can choose to set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of this FORTIFICATION. If you do, that AELDARI unit can be set up within 9" of enemy models, and can be set up within Engagement Range of enemy models. If an AELDARI unit is set up within Engagement Range of any enemy models in this way, it counts as having made a Charge move this turn and is eligible to fight this turn.

abilities.name: Deployment
abilities.text: Both Wraithbone Arches of this Fortification must be set up with their upper points no more than 1" apart and with both statues facing in fully opposite directions so that an arch is formed, as shown on the right. Both arches are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more ^^**Fortifications**^^ from your army:
- That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
- Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.name: Swift Demise
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is the closest eligible target, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Malevolent Souls
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 3+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Psychic Guidance
abilities.text: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly Aeldari Psyker models, models in this unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: War Construct
abilities.text: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Psychic Guidance
abilities.text: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly Aeldari Psyker models, models in this unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Titanic Strides
abilities.text:
Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding Titanic models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so:
It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after it has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, this model is battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Point-blank Devastation
abilities.text: Each time this model's Heavy Wraithcannon or Suncannon targets a unit within half range, you can re-roll the dice to determine the number of attacks made.

abilities.name: Scattershield
abilities.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save and each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Titanic Agility
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

abilities.name: Scattershield
abilities.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save and each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Fated Hero
abilities.text: At the start of the battle, select one of the following keywords: Infantry, Monster, Mounted, Vehicle. Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit with the selected keyword, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Psychic Guidance
abilities.text: While this model is within 12" of one or more friendly Aeldari Psyker models, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by this model by 1 and it has a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Horrify (Psychic)
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Ynnari Incubi
■ Ynnari Kabalite Warriors

abilities.name: Overlord
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While that unit is below its Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Reborn Mastermind
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratgem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save - Shadow Field
abilities.text: An Archon has an Invulnerable Save of 2+. You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for the bearer. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for the bearer is failed, until the end of the battle, the bearer has no invulnerable saving throw.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Tormentors
abilities.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Sadistic Raiders
abilities.text: At the end of your Command phase, if you control an objective marker that this unit (or a Transport it is embarked within) is within range of, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control  over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of any phase.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Aethersails
abilities.text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 6+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Eviscerating Fly-by
abilities.text: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Empowered by Death
abilities.text: At the start of the Fight phase, if this model's unit is below its Starting Strength, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

abilities.name: Storm of Blades
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Ynnari Wyches

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Lithe Embarkation
abilities.text: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this Transport, you can select one friendly Ynnari Infantry unit that only includes models from the units listed in this unit's Transport section, that has 6 or fewer models and that is wholly within 6" of this Transport. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this Transport.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save against ranged attacks, and 4+ Invulnerable save against melee attacks.

abilities.name: No Escape
abilities.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (Yvraine)
abilities.text: Yvraine has a 4+ Invulnerable save

abilities.name: Herald of Ynnead
abilities.text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Aeldari model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Word of the Phoenix (Psychic)
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, D3+1 destroyed Bodyguard models (excluding Support Weapon models) are returned to that unit with their full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corsair Voidscarred
■ Corsair Voidreavers
■ Guardian Defenders
■ Storm Guardians
■ Ynnari Incubi
■ Ynnari Kabalite Warriors
■ Ynnari Wyches

abilities.name: Servant of the Whispering God
abilities.text: If your army includes Yvraine, it cannot include any Epic Hero units (excluding Ynnari units). If your army includes any Epic Hero units (excluding Ynnari units), it cannot include Yvraine.
